text: Right here, right now, the body is breathing all by itself.
Notice the ground under you. The chair holding you. You are held.
This breath, this pause, this next breath. Nothing else is needed.
Steady. The body has done this before and remembers how.
Two short breaths in. One long breath out. The exhale is the door.
Something rose. You noticed. That's the whole skill.
Feet on the floor. Hands on something. The body is here.
Breathe out longer than you breathe in. Just for a minute.
The body is finding its way back. Let it. Don't rush it.
Slower in. Slower out. The wave is settling.
You came back. Some part of you knew the way.
This is what return feels like. Remember it.
